on_supervisor.title: Set up Claude
on_supervisor.description: Claude for Home Assistant runs through the Claude Code add-on. Do you want to set it up using the add-on?

data_description.use_addon: The add-on runs Claude on your Home Assistant host and is required by this integration.

hassio_confirm.title: Set up Claude with the Claude Code add-on
hassio_confirm.description: Do you want to set up Claude using the discovered {addon} add-on?

progress.install_addon: Please wait while the Claude Code add-on is installed. This can take several minutes.
progress.start_addon: Please wait while the Claude Code add-on starts.

abort.not_hassio: This integration requires the Home Assistant Supervisor and the Claude Code add-on.
abort.not_claude_addon: The discovered add-on is not the Claude Code add-on.
abort.addon_not_found: The Claude Code add-on could not be found. Add its repository and install the add-on, then try again.
abort.addon_required: The Claude Code add-on is required to use this integration.
abort.addon_info_failed: Failed to get the Claude Code add-on info.
abort.addon_install_failed: Failed to install the Claude Code add-on.
abort.addon_start_failed: Failed to start the Claude Code add-on.
abort.addon_get_discovery_info_failed: Failed to get the Claude Code add-on connection details.

data_description.auto_execute: When on, Claude carries out low-risk requests from chat immediately and only asks you to confirm important ones. When off, every change is confirmed first.
data_description.critical_entities: Entities that always require confirmation, on top of the automatic per-action risk checks.
data_description.camera_vision: When on, a clearly visual question (e.g. 'who's at the door?') may send one snapshot of an Assist-exposed camera to Claude. Off by default; snapshots are more sensitive than state.

ask.name: Ask Claude
ask.description: Sends a prompt to Claude and returns its response.

config_entry.name: Claude
config_entry.description: The Claude configuration to use. Defaults to the only one if a single Claude is configured.

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: The prompt to send to Claude.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: read (default) answers and proposes changes without acting; write lets Claude act, scoped to the confirmed request — only use this from trusted automations.

intents.name: Intents
intents.description: Required for write mode: the confirmed intents to carry out, echoed from a prior read-mode proposal (at most 5).

notify.name: Confirm via
notify.description: Optional notify service (e.g. mobile_app_my_phone). If Claude proposes a change, an actionable Approve/Dismiss notification is sent there; Approve runs the confirmed change.

setup_voice.name: Set up local voice
setup_voice.description: Installs the Whisper (speech-to-text) and Piper (text-to-speech) add-ons for a language and creates an Assist pipeline that talks to Claude. Whisper on CPU takes a few seconds per phrase, and some voices (e.g. Ukrainian) are weaker than others — override the voice or use Cloud TTS if needed.

config_entry.name: Claude
config_entry.description: The Claude configuration to use. Defaults to the only one if a single Claude is configured.

language.name: Language
language.description: The language code for speech, e.g. uk, pl, en, de.

stt_model.name: Whisper model
stt_model.description: The Whisper speech-to-text model. Defaults to small-int8, a multilingual model that runs on CPU.

tts_voice.name: Piper voice
tts_voice.description: The Piper text-to-speech voice, e.g. uk_UA-ukrainian_tts-medium. Defaults to a known voice for the language; override if it is unavailable.

pipeline_name.name: Pipeline name
pipeline_name.description: Name for the created Assist pipeline. Defaults to Claude and the language, for example Claude (uk).

unknown.message: Unexpected error talking to the Claude Code add-on.

cannot_connect.message: The Claude Code add-on is not reachable.

auth_error.message: The Claude Code add-on rejected the request. The shared token may be out of date.

rate_limited.message: The Claude Code add-on is busy or rate-limited. Try again shortly.

request_rejected.message: The Claude Code add-on rejected the request as invalid.

no_config_entry.message: No single Claude configuration is available; specify which one to use.

entry_not_loaded.message: The selected Claude configuration is not loaded.

prompt_too_large.message: The prompt is too large. The maximum size is {max_bytes} bytes.

write_requires_intents.message: Write mode requires the confirmed intents from a prior read-mode proposal.

too_many_intents.message: Too many intents. At most {max} may be sent in a write request.

intents_require_write.message: Intents can only be sent with mode 'write'.

addon_not_ready.message: The Claude Code add-on is not ready yet.

addon_info_failed.message: Failed to get the Claude Code add-on info.

addon_not_installed.message: The Claude Code add-on is being installed.

addon_not_running.message: The Claude Code add-on is starting.

voice_unknown_language.message: No default Piper voice is known for the language {language}. Pass a voice via the tts_voice field.

voice_addon_failed.message: Failed to set up the {addon} add-on: {error}

addon_not_running.title: The Claude Code add-on is not running

confirm.title: Start the Claude Code add-on
confirm.description: The Claude Code add-on is installed but not running, so Claude is unavailable. Do you want to start it now?

abort.start_failed: Failed to start the Claude Code add-on. Check the add-on logs and try again.

addon_not_installed.title: The Claude Code add-on is not installed
addon_not_installed.description: Claude is unavailable because the Claude Code add-on is not installed. Home Assistant is trying to install it; check the add-on for progress.

not_logged_in.title: Claude isn't logged in
not_logged_in.description: The Claude Code add-on is running but Claude isn't authenticated, so chat can't answer. Open the Claude Code add-on and run `claude` to log in (or set an OAuth token in the add-on options), then check again.

no_ha_token.title: Claude has no token to read your home
no_ha_token.description: Claude is logged in but has no Home Assistant token, so chat can answer general questions but can't see or control your home. Set the 'Prompt API HA Token' (or 'HA Token') in the Claude Code add-on options, then check again.

mcp_unreachable.title: Claude can't reach the Model Context Protocol Server
mcp_unreachable.description: Claude has a token but the Model Context Protocol Server integration is missing or unreachable, so chat can't see your home. Add it under Settings → Devices & services → Add integration → Model Context Protocol Server, expose entities to Assist, then check again.

no_exposed_entities.title: No entities are exposed to Assist
no_exposed_entities.description: Claude can reach your home but nothing is exposed to Assist, so there is nothing for it to see or control. Expose some entities under Settings → Voice assistants → Expose, then check again.

camera_vision_no_cameras.title: Camera vision is on, but no cameras are exposed to Assist
camera_vision_no_cameras.description: You turned on 'Let Claude look at cameras', but no camera is exposed to Assist, so Claude can never see one — Home Assistant hides cameras from Assist by default as security devices. Expose the camera(s) you want Claude to see under Settings → Voice assistants → Expose (the high-resolution channel of each camera), then check again.
